mapper.select:
SELECT IDX, TITLE, WRITER, TO_CHAR(REGDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') REGDATE, HIT FROM BOARD
AND MENU_ID = #{menu_id}
AND ${searchType} LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
ORDER BY IDX DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{numOfRows} ROWS ONLY
SELECT IDX, MENU_ID, TITLE, CONTENT, WRITER, TO_CHAR(REGDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') REGDATE, HIT FROM BOARD WHERE IDX = #{idx}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO BOARD ( IDX, MENU_ID, TITLE, WRITER, CONTENT ) VALUES ( (SELECT NVL(MAX(IDX), 0) + 1 FROM BOARD), #{menu_id}, #{title}, #{writer}, #{content} )
